textByHash.c3ff7047350a72dc22d70479f6dc839bfbd3c034: Hello. Could I interest you in a Blackjack?
textByHash.9295b4ae1bc75019875a1daa7904dd71523d6214: What are we talking about here? Nothing dodgy I hope. I don't like anything dodgy, I had enough of that sort of thing when the bandits and those rogue Menaphites were running things here, so I packed up my things and left.
textByHash.3303d4d2ba63f3d1361a8c25845bf740e047088c: Have I what? He's my idol, he's the greatest salesman in all of Gielinor. Word has it that he even sold...
textByHash.3a44c2eb3d40d4ae06e4153b047db05fe8c0b154: I'm all ears. Does he want to take me on as an apprentice?
textByHash.ebaa83edc0b2095df2a3fec270478d546f603810: The urchins of the town do too, they're always trying to steal my products.
textByHash.1758c66c9106a5eb99486c042f3b64228d9f5f7b: I don't know. I'm quite happy with the product that I'm making at the moment.
textByHash.f4b3163fcc1468c8ed14d3d5fb86d52c26255f56: Well I suppose if you could demonstrate to me that they weren't up to the job.
textByHash.d4d960f324f29e0a09bdf968899f9e3a96e16344: Nah, I don't like the sounds of that. It leaves a lot up to chance.
textByHash.3801110e8fee0094b6b47b03a2eece0ab8a26e20: Are you sure? I could possibly kill you?
textByHash.3b1744dd9b82cffba7ca619772bc7ca8b0704cbb: Phew! Sighs with relief. At last the voice of reason speaks.
textByHash.f8e5b315d515ef925f0d87840748197d9d96c1d4: Now if you don't mind I'll be getting back to work. Thank you.
textByHash.70a032b0288b6f5bc7e45d8c4883bf46c446d4cd: Either your head is thicker than it looks or else I need to rework my blackjack.
textByHash.c133bb55eeecbb2839b0669c3831847e6ebcfa61: I suppose I'll just have to modify the blackjack so that it has a better attack.
textByHash.79d84b075820c5e18eb4efca6af2128c46d197cf: Yes, yes. I'll start shipping it by carpet as soon as the first batch is ready.
textByHash.16990ea721c25c606bb4d81c51a509c6c2c508f8: That pesky little urchin has done it again! I can't believe it he's managed to rob me again.
textByHash.68df5fa9d8bd142b4221c4a03b34be46c07e1164: I might as well. Next time I'll get him.
textByHash.3084615aa91c8f16e6df1e5b9efe0b17c5e3bb92: Oh sorry Player. I mistook you for another customer.
textByHash.336d217d2b9979c6c5df6566dfb277a4b15af795: Have you checked with Ali Morrisane whether my blackjacks are selling or not?
textByHash.001d4d534ae30c972977ee9c3c0f595bbe24416d: Well I would be very grateful if you could have a talk with him sooner rather than later, I am still a little nervous about the new variation of my blackjack.
